title: Origins Player Sizes
description: Adds an origin layer to customize your size!
body:
Adds a new origins layer that allows you to pick your size!
## 7 Sizes to Pick From!
### Micro:
![Micro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dfcda3a2351f01d423ca2cd8a05e1f389e1edd8.png)
**Size:** 1 Block
### Tiny:
![Tiny](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cfb90369fd51d091d3a4a776734247fda90536d.png)
**Size:** 1.25 Blocks
### Small:
![Small](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c4a463b50f1f3edd72fb32dcdeaa559a6d5957a.png)
**Size:** 1.75 Blocks
### Normal:
![Normal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94b7edacc61ca2f951c56253a93e98013f0ad7e0.png)
**Size:** 2 Blocks
### Big:
![Big](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb7feb7a76a2e00fd8af5eacf7d9c803c6ad0e58.png)
**Size:** 2.25 Blocks
### Massive:
![Massive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30ba38a172243d49ca5b282efbab72593e047196.png)
**Size:** 3 Blocks
### Gargantuan:
![Gargantuan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9b761a3c74c5025e16774b489340b4c1eba6602.png)
**Size:** 3.5 Blocks
## FAQ
**Will you update/backport to 1.X.X?:** No. I made this for my SMP as a replacement for the [Origins: Player Scale](https://modrinth.com/datapack/origins-player-scale) mod, so until my server updates (which won't be soon), this is the only version you'll get. I am not going to backport at all.
## Dependencies
[Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins "Origins Mod (Modrinth)")

[Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui "Pehkui Mod (Modrinth)")

**Note that this mod is server-side, but the dependencies listed above are required on the client AND server**
